_description: Curated PubChem entry policies and skip names. Edit this file instead of verify_pubchem.py.

High Fructose Corn Syrup.reason: processed mixture; no single authoritative PubChem compound

Polyethylene Glycol (PEG).reason: polymer / non-discrete PubChem substance; curated CAS only

Polyvinylpyrrolidone (PVP).reason: polymer / non-discrete PubChem substance; curated CAS only

Polydextrose.reason: polymer mixture; no single authoritative PubChem compound

Carrageenan.reason: complex polysaccharide mixture; keep curated CAS only

Maltodextrin.reason: polysaccharide mixture; no single authoritative PubChem compound

Carboxymethylcellulose (CMC).reason: cellulose derivative mixture; keep curated CAS only

Carboxymethyl Cellulose.reason: generic carboxymethyl cellulose row should not borrow sodium carboxymethylcellulose PubChem identifiers

Casein Hydrolysate.reason: protein hydrolysate label does not have a trustworthy exact PubChem compound identity and should not inherit parent-casein or acrylamide identifiers

Iron Oxide.reason: regulatory pigment class spans multiple iron oxide species; keep curated CAS only

Mineral Oil.reason: petroleum mixture; keep curated CAS only

Soy Monoglycerides.reason: fatty-acid monoglyceride mixture; keep curated CAS only

Hydrogenated Starch Hydrolysate.reason: sugar-alcohol mixture; no single authoritative PubChem compound

Isomaltooligosaccharide.reason: oligosaccharide mixture; no single authoritative PubChem compound

Cuprous Oxide.reason: PubChem primary CAS 1308-76-5 is beryllium oxide, not cuprous oxide; curated CAS 1317-39-1 is correct

Xanthan Gum.reason: PubChem resolves to xanthene (CAS 92-83-1, CID 7107) instead of xanthan gum polysaccharide (CAS 11138-66-2)
